description_long: This object is a compact, pump-action shotgun with a matte black metal barrel and receiver, paired with a dark wooden or synthetic pistol grip. The barrel is relatively short, making it suitable for close-quarters use, and features a tubular magazine beneath it. The fore-end is ribbed for grip and is clearly designed to be pumped back and forth to chamber rounds. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized to protect the trigger while allowing easy access. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functionality and durability.
description: A compact, pump-action shotgun with a short black barrel, ribbed fore-end, and a dark pistol grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening and the tubular magazine beneath, with the pump handle visible below.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the shotgun, including the ribbed pump handle, trigger guard, and curved pistol grip.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the receiver and the end of the pistol grip, with the barrel and magazine aligned forward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the shotgun's profile, including the pump handle, trigger guard, and the curvature of the grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, tubular magazine beneath, short barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
